summary: Anonymous user archive game - Feed Select

steps.action: WHEN the user selects an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN the following text displays in the Feed Select modal "Subscription Required", "A subscription is needed to watch this game.", "Full Game Access" (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND a [Upgrade Plan] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select the [Upgrade Plan] button
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page after pressing the "BACK" button on the controller
